concerns_addressed: Prior [Critical] cycle-3 failure 'Queue stranding on board-create FAILURE path' — FIXED. agentQueue.ts:48-55 adds pure routeNext(fire, boardExists); AgentPage.tsx:288-296 calls routeNext with boardRef.current !== null and re-enters createBoard (via createBoardRef.current, AgentPage.tsx:254-256,310) when no board exists, instead of unconditionally routing to sendMessage. sendMessage no longer early-returns and strands isGenerating=true. New tests agentQueue.test.ts:60-77 cover routeNext including the create-failure (no-board) branch.

Prior [Minor] cycle-3 failure 'Chat input not disabled after approval when execution completes' — FIXED. AgentPage.tsx:620 input disabled now includes board?.status === 'approved' (previously only busy || isRunning); AgentPage.tsx:625-630 submit button mirrors the same condition. Approved status persists through running/done/failed, so input stays disabled after execution completes, satisfying spec Story 3 Rule 4.

strengths: Queue logic is a pure, fully unit-tested state machine in lib/agentQueue.ts (submit/settle/routeNext); all 9 tests pass. Routing decision was extracted into a pure function rather than buried inline, keeping the orchestration testable.
boardRef/createBoardRef ref pattern correctly handles the synchronous queue-handoff stale-closure problem and is documented with precise comments (AgentPage.tsx:163-167, 251-256, 309-310).

Spec compliance is complete: empty-state CTA + enabled input, read-only board visual (buttons, no @dnd-kit), explanation panel, approve flow, DB-fail keeps board pending with re-enabled approve, execution log driven by agentEvents from useBoard (no useSSE), retry buttons for generate/approve/execution failures.
AgentCardDetail is strictly read-only: system_prompt, reasoning ON/OFF badge, output via getAgentCardOutput, Escape-to-close; no input/textarea/editable controls present.
activeWorkspaceId === null guard present (AgentPage.tsx:398); uses showToast and activeWorkspaceId from useBoard per the corrected context shape (no workspaceId/addToast, no SSEContext).

issues.description: Event log list uses the array index as React key (key={i}), which is acceptable for an append-only stream but could cause subtle reconciliation issues if the list were ever filtered/reordered. Non-blocking.
